question: Will Platinum spot price on NYMEX exceed 1000 USD/oz on May 31, 2026?
reason: Platinum spot price on May 27, 2026, is $1,922.00, well above $1,000.00.
evidence: Platinum spot price on May 27, 2026, is $1,922.00, well above $1,000.00.
Zimbabwe's export ban on raw minerals, including platinum, could tighten global supply, potentially increasing prices.
The World Platinum Investment Council forecasts a market deficit of 297,000 ounces in 2026, indicating supply shortages.
Zimplats' furnace maintenance in Zimbabwe led to a 26% year-on-year decline in platinum output in Q1 2026.
The current weather in Zimbabwe is hazy sunshine with temperatures ranging from 47°F to 77°F, unlikely to impact platinum prices.
